svg.text: Class design, method signatures, data flow, and internal logic
On JSONDecodeError → silent retry with strict JSON prompt
Injects grounding_context and risk_tags into prompt
Requests JSON with 8 technique objects + summary
conf ≥ 75 and risk < 30 → PASS 50-74 → FLAG else → BLOCK
4. Conservative consensus: if BLOCK in either → BLOCK
Validated by Pydantic v2 — all fields type-checked on creation
agreement_color : str # hex color for badge
consensus is always conservative — BLOCK promoted if either model says BLOCK
Falls back to INDUSTRIES["General"] if name not found
_clean_and_parse() with automatic retry on parse failure (~2% of API calls)
